def negative_python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_missing_warmup():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_missing_warmup"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag benchmarks that time import/setup/warmup along with the operation under test."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
